published_prior_art.cite: ma2021minimaxope gives an OPE Le Cam lower-bound template, but not bounded mean-preserving second-moment paths for adaptive Neyman regret
neopane2024logarithmic and zhao2023adaptive treat learning the Neyman allocation, but do not isolate this tangent-information nonemptiness and finiteness condition
neopane2024logarithmic defines the HT variance objective and Neyman allocation, making the local quadratic expansion algebraic but not used as a converse object
kato2025treatmentchoice gives adaptive change-of-measure lower bounds for treatment-choice welfare/simple regret, not cumulative Neyman-regret variance inefficiency
neopane2024logarithmic and noarov2025stronger give logarithmic or near-logarithmic upper bounds; I found no inf_Alg sup_nu Omega(log T) converse for the same Neyman-regret objective
neopane2024logarithmic already gives pi_Ney=1/2 when arm root second moments match; the separation from positive local complexity is new but supporting
zhao2023adaptive motivates standard-deviation learning and Neopane/Noarov expose upper-bound parameter dependence, but no paper solves this class-level lower-bound extremal program

accepted_scope_caveats.label: ass:arm-tangent-nondegeneracy / ass:tangent-band
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The logarithmic lower bound is conditional on the tangent-regular bounded-outcome regime excluding arm laws where second-moment perturbations are degenerate or nearly degenerate.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The headline is a sharp minimax Neyman-regret lower bound on the tangent-regular class M_tan and its compact subclass M(underline_m, overline_m, underline_r), not on all bounded-outcome laws.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:closed-form-frontier
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The constant-exact class frontier K and finite-support extremal law are explicitly left open rather than assumed.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The flagship claim is the Omega(log T) minimax lower-bound rate with kappa_nu as an information-program handle; closed-form constants are supplementary open content.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a small worked three-point arm-law example computing r_a, J_a, dot_pi, and kappa_nu to make the local information object inspectable from primitives.

State an explicit corollary pairing thm:global-log-rate with Neopane's superpopulation O(log T) upper bound on the overlapping parameter regime, so the rate-matching claim is theorem-local rather than prose-local.
Sharpen lem:path-existence by naming the residual-score construction s_a proportional to y^2 projected off span{1,y}; this would make the bounded mean-preserving path less promissory for Stage 0.
For the closed-form-frontier OEQ, specify the finite-support search dimension or a Caratheodory-style support-size target for the dual program.

recommended_next_step: Advance this angle to Stage 0; prioritize proving the tangent path construction and the instancewise Le Cam lower bound before attempting the closed-form frontier.
